series_metadata.series_description: Surveys used to evaluate internal and external “customer” satisfaction, measure outcomes, and develop performance measures and benchmarks, as well as the compilation of answers, used to upgrade, monitor, or improve existing services within the agency. Includes National Core Indicators, state administered.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 1 year after completion of the survey and related analysis, or until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 1 year after completion of the survey and related analysis., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
